title: Mcqueen Boat
description: This texture pack replaces the boat with a character from the cartoon "Cars" McQueen
body:
![Mcqueen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad205d13d776b270beab2d16181c388eaf5731cc.png)


|You are fan of lightning mqueen?

|This texture pack changes the classic Minecraft ship, and replaces it with a fun Lightning McQueen 3D of Cars, Disney.

|The New MCqueen Skins is so cool.

|By @Ruply_
